key.name: show-operator-buttons-desktop
key.summary: Show quick operator buttons on desktop
key.description: If enabled, Wombat shows +, -, *, /, and ^ quick-insert operator buttons in desktop layouts.

key.name: use-calculator-look
key.description: If enabled, Wombat uses its built-in calculator-inspired visual theme. If disabled, Wombat follows the system theme.
